testimonials.text: Dr. Liang's acupuncture treatments completely transformed my chronic back pain that I'd suffered with for years. Her gentle approach and deep knowledge of TCM gave me my life back. I feel stronger and more balanced than I have in decades.

The custom herbal formulas Dr. Liang created for my digestive issues worked better than anything I'd tried before. She took time to really understand my body's patterns and designed a treatment plan that addressed the root cause.

I was skeptical about cupping therapy, but Dr. Liang explained everything so clearly and the results for my shoulder tension were remarkable. The combination of treatments she uses really works synergistically.

Dr. Liang helped me through a difficult period of anxiety and panic attacks using acupuncture and lifestyle counseling. Her compassionate approach and effective treatments gave me tools to manage my stress naturally.
The tuina massage sessions with Dr. Liang are incredibly therapeutic. She has such skilled hands and understands exactly how to release tension while balancing my qi. I always leave feeling renewed.
